textByHashes.bdec050526a550c050beebe7d9403ca7a811b979: Sorry, but this is NOT a good morning!
textByHashes.e5fecbd96ccbf48296105aa1ef31e9ce631ebad6: I'm going to lose my job!
textByHashes.7812ce3298048751d2c109100c35d794d195ce27: Nothing! But the Piscatoris Fishing Colony is going to go out of business, and I'll have to go back to the east.
textByHashes.15fef23db869dd3fc5c2fd57d5390da92b580ea4: If you want to help, you can get Kathy to take you up to the Colony. Herman's looking for someone to run an important errand for him.
textByHashes.5230a7df5e526fa5c1ace53c619d7fde2066cda6: Hello! What can I do for you?
textByHashes.ad2e0bc49f777537c79021c06c17ca2444fa802b: Well, it's been fairly quiet around here, but there's always repair work to keep us busy.
textByHashes.0dad61ad258f65e4dfc1995442af2bb8f4644b41: Oh yes, lots of them. Their population's been swelling ever since you wiped out the trolls in the area. They've hardly got any natural predators now.
textByHashes.0daf59c4cfa440b290f50e2368d367f79689fe2d: Franklin's got me fixing this wall. You did a pretty good patch-job, but it could do with some work.
textByHashes.e7df281bb9a033a9d4d9f85125a5de7d73194500: Yes, that's right. I'll probably get Arnold to order some fancy protective paint from the dwarves.
textByHashes.c4a1f5cc694611d75168e799cdff375d1a1bca24: Yes, the salt does terrible things to the hinges. I've been meaning to deal with them, but I never seem to get around to it.
